results.rendered_html:
saṃrūḍha p. p.
1 Grown together.
2 Cicatrized, healed; as in saṃrūḍhavraṇa.
3 Shot forth, sprouted, budded, germinated;  R. 6. 47. 
4 Firmly grown, striking firm root.
5 Bold, confident.
